reviews.comment:
Baño público afuera de la Estación. Se puede calentar agua para termo. Y comprar en el Shop todo lo que necesites.

(Translated by Google)
Public restroom outside the station. You can heat water for your thermos. And buy everything you need at the shop.

reviews.comment:
Horrible lugar! Viajamos desde Río Negro y nunca nos paso, en ninguna YPF, una YPF ACA NO nos dejara usar los baños ni a mi nene de 2 Anitos! Una vergüenza, MALISIMA la atención al cliente 😠
En ACA Choele Choele no tienen este inconveniente!!!

(Translated by Google)
Horrible place! We traveled from Río Negro and this has never happened to us at any other YPF station. At the ACA station, they wouldn't let us use the restrooms, not even my 2-year-old son! It's a disgrace, the customer service is TERRIBLE 😠
They don't have this problem at the ACA in Choele Choele!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnMy15WnFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una porqueria no nos dejaron entrar a comprar x q mi señora usaba biquini y pantalon corto (lleva nuestra bebe de un año y medio en brazos) desde el mostrador y alos gritos la empleada nos prohibia el ingreso...

(Translated by Google)
It was awful; they wouldn't let us in to buy anything because my wife was wearing a bikini and shorts (she was carrying our one-and-a-half-year-old baby). The employee was yelling at us from behind the counter and forbidding us from entering...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaWFhN0F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Nada fuera de lo normal excepto no me dejaron usar los sanitarios, un echo totalmente reprobable, acostumbrados a un turismo del siglo pasado deberían ya ponerse a tono con la época

(Translated by Google)
Nothing out of the ordinary except they didn't let me use the restrooms, a totally reprehensible fact. Those who are used to tourism from the last century should get used to the times.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRN055eEV3EAE

reviews.comment:
El surtidor local para abastecerse de combustible, en un momento tambien habia gomeria que era importante para esa pequeña comunidad rural pero por internas sindicales ya no brinda estos servicios.
Cuenta con un local de autoservicio para insumos básicos y una plaza con juegos infantiles de vecina.

(Translated by Google)
The local gas station, which once also housed a tire shop that was important to this small rural community, is no longer operating due to internal union disputes. It also has a convenience store for basic supplies and a neighborhood playground.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRXzRUUFpREAE
